summary: The 412th Nemesis Brigade’s Asgard battalion destroyed over 130 vehicles and dozens of motorcycles near Huliaipole in January-February 2026. Russian Ka-52 helicopters were downed by Ukrainian FPV drones near Pokrovsk and Nadiivka, with additional strikes on crews during evacuation attempts. The "Elka" anti-drone system intercepted Ukrainian "Darts" drones via kinetic impact, while the "Rubikon" Center eliminated 83 Ukrainian targets, including UAVs and control points, across multiple fronts. Ukrainian forces sank a Russian boat near Tendrivska Spit using an FPV drone, and the SBU’s "Alpha" unit neutralized 1,834 Russian troops in a week. Airstrikes hit Ukrainian drone launch sites in Krasnoyarskoye, DNR.
